transcript.text:
8 plates of salmon
8 plates...?!
[8 plates of salmon...]
[That's a full table]
I ordered 1 as a whole
[A never-ending flow of emotions]
[Explodes]
[Let's get into it]
[One street in Chungmu-ro]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Chungmu-ro in Seoul
I've been craving some raw salmon lately
I found a restaurant here that looked really good
Chungmu Salmon
[Chungmu Yeoneo] [Seoul, Jung-gu]
Hello

2nd floor?
The menu I see salmon
8 plates of salmon,
And ham cheese, please
8 plates...?!
[That's 2kg...]
[Alright]
Ham cheese as well
[Don't worry, I won't forget]
[It keeps stacking...]
[Waves of salmon]
[Salmon is served]
First time serving 2kg
Thank you, sir
It's really been a while
Looks really good I can already tell from its glossiness

Looks yummy
I asked 1 as a whole
This one is not cut I'll start off with this one first
With some soy sauce
It's gone
It disappeared That's so soft
I take 1 bite and half of it is gone
Another bite finishes it off
So soft
There's no fishiness at all Very delicious
[With some horseradish sauce]
[Electrocuted]
That's so good
Eating it as a whole is the best
Just a little bit on top
This is the belly

The tail meat is chewy while the belly meat is oily and tender
Thick white lines indicate the belly meat, and the thin white lines are the tail meat
With a little bit of wasabi,
Horseradish sauce,
Onions,
That's so good!
There are a lot of old restaurants here in Chungmu-ro
I'm by myself here on the 2nd floor
[Shake it]
[Why're we embarrassed for her?]
Tail meat is tasty too It has more consistency
With some chewiness
Some people prefer the tail more
But I like the body
Onions,
With some sauce

And on top
No fishiness
3 pieces at once
With chojang (chili sauce with vinegar)
Wasabi and soy sauce
Dip it
I was not able to eat wasabi at first
But it's so good now
[Can't have sashimi without wasabi!]
The onions are sweet
This is the caper I've never tried it before
Let's give 1 a try
Feels like a bean, but it's a little sour
It neutralizes the greasiness
I think eating it with a little bit of wasabi and soy sauce taste the best
He said that he's in his 70's running this restaurant by himself

So if the store gets crowded, the food might take a while to come out
Please keep that in mind before you visit
Caper? Not bad at all
Not bad!
Now I know why
Belly meat
It has a lot of white parts And it looks like this
Thick white layer
The oily the meat, the better it tastes with wasabi
Belly meat, my favorite
Belly belly
These are the best
The oiliness is not too overwhelming? Savory?
That's so good!
On top
Ham cheese!

Thank you
-Enjoy your meal -Thank you
This is the ham cheese It comes with pickles, but I asked him not to include it
Look at this You can't go wrong with this
This reminds me of the time when I ate canned ham without my mom finding out
I never eat radish sprouts Don't think I've had it before
I'll try it to find out
It's not bad
Not as good as onions
This should be good with some salmon too
Just like this
Salmon ham cheese
I wonder what it tastes like
It kinda goes well, but not really, but it does
This is very addicting
Ham cheese tastes so good

It's good with just soy sauce as well
Another plate gone already?
Balancing it out
I got permission from the owner to use my own buldak fire chicken sauce
I enjoy eating salmon with cream sauce or spicy sauce
The spiciness and the fish oil together
The sauce itself is very spicy, but eating it with salmon isn't too spicy
Caper
It's good like this too
With some soy sauce
Why do people only eat a little bit? It's too good
Soy sauce
All of this at once
There's a little piece of carrot to hold it together But I can't really taste it
[Concentrating]
Salmon house

It looks like a house
The white part over here This is yummy
Delicious
Exhilarating
I used to be a very picky eater, but I'm not as picky anymore these days
I'm eating radish sprouts, onions, caper, and this right here
But ginger...?
Let's do it
I think I can do it I can eat all vegetables now
I'm not ready for ginger yet
I'm almost done already
It's too spicy if I put too much wasabi
4 at once
What if I want to add wasabi on here?
That's too much!
Only 1 plate left

1 bite of ham cheese
How many was this?
12 of them
There's this dish called Myeol Nu Tang I'm very curious
What is Myeol Nu Tang?
Myeolchi (anchovy) & Nurungji (crispy rice) soup
-Are you Tzuang? -Tzuang?
Very close!
[The owner did not recognize her at first]
Eating the salmon with Myeol Nu Tang makes a great meal
[Perfect to pair with some soju]
[Will try it next time]
I've done a lot of raw fish mukbangs
It's safe to say that I can eat more yellowtail than salmon
I like salmon~
Only the belly meat left

[Viewer: Please eat my belly meat too]
It's so tasty
[Finished]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
